name: @unoverse-platform/smart-document
description: SmartDocument node: agent-managed long-form markdown document with section-based MCP edit tools (outline / readSection / updateSection / appendToSection / replaceInSection / insertSection / deleteSection / moveSection / resetDoc). Stable section IDs and content hashes. Redis-backed state.

nodes.name: Smart Document
nodes.description: Produce a long-form deliverable — report, plan, spec, article, brief — that an agent writes and revises section by section, live-rendering on every edit
